name: Axis Reserve Credit Card

categoryRates.description: 5 EDGE Reward Points per ₹200 spent on all purchases (2.5% base)
15X EDGE Reward Points (15 per ₹200) on Axis Travel EDGE portal bookings

redemptionOptions: Flights and hotels via Axis Travel EDGE portal (1 point = up to ₹1.50)
Transfer to airline partners (InterMiles, Singapore KrisFlyer, Etihad Guest, British Airways, etc.)

welcomeBenefits.description: 50,000 EDGE Reward Points on card activation
welcomeBenefits.condition: Credited on first transaction within 45 days

additionalBenefits: Zero foreign currency markup - best in class for international spends
Unlimited domestic and international lounge access with guest access
15X rewards on Axis Travel EDGE portal bookings
5 points per ₹200 base earn rate (2.5%) on all spends

pros: Zero foreign currency markup is unmatched - massive savings on international spends
2.5% base reward rate on all spends is among the highest in India
Unlimited lounge access with guest access for both domestic and international
15X rewards on travel portal gives exceptional value for frequent travellers

cons: ₹50,000 annual fee is the highest among Indian credit cards

faqs.question: Is the Axis Reserve card really zero foreign currency markup?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Axis Reserve Credit Card charges 0% foreign currency markup on all international transactions. This is the only major Indian credit card to offer true zero markup, saving 2-3.5% compared to most other cards.

faqs.question: How valuable are EDGE Reward Points on the Reserve card?
faqs.answer: Points are worth ₹0.50 each as statement credit, but can be valued up to ₹1.50 per point when redeemed strategically on the Axis Travel EDGE portal for premium flights and hotels.

faqs.question: Does the guest also get free lounge access?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Axis Reserve card includes complimentary lounge access for a guest accompanying the primary cardholder, both for domestic and international lounges.

faqs.question: Is the ₹50,000 annual fee worth it?
faqs.answer: For high spenders (₹25L+/year), the 2.5% base rewards, milestone benefits (up to 85,000 bonus points), zero FX markup, and unlimited lounge access can deliver value well exceeding the fee. The welcome benefit of 50,000 points alone is worth ₹25,000.
